rules.name: Validators validate external input
rules.description: Incoming request payloads must be validated before they are mapped into service request DTOs.

rules.name: Validators use API boundary names
rules.description: Payload validators at the route/API boundary must validate camelCase JSON field names.

rules.name: Validators centralize reusable validation
rules.description: Reusable validation logic must live in validator modules/classes rather than being duplicated in route handlers.

rules.name: Validators do not perform persistence
rules.description: Validators must not contain SQL or direct repository persistence logic.

rules.name: Validators should remain rule-focused
rules.description: Validators should focus on validation concerns only and should not perform orchestration, transport formatting, persistence coordination, or business workflow execution.
